retrieved_result: 13.3 Determining On Duty And Off Duty Time 13.3 Determining On Duty And Off Duty Time What Is Considered On Duty Time? The 60 / 70 hour limit is based on how many hours you work over a 7 or 8 day period. Just what kind of work is considered on duty time? It includes all time you are working or are required to be ready to work, for any employ
